hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance and operations teams consolidate multiple provider dashboards into a single workflow that preserves audit evidence and streamlines onboarding and case management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance slows when providers stay disconnected
problem_description: Compliance teams managing multiple providers face slow onboarding and duplicated efforts due to separate dashboards and fragmented data. This disconnection weakens audit readiness and clouds risk visibility across KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, and case management workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates diverse provider outputs across KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, and case management into one unified compliance operating workflow that enhances visibility, accelerates onboarding, and strengthens audit evidence.
workflow_title: From fragmented provider checks to decisions
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates multiple provider outputs into structured reviews, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation within a single compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented dashboards. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple provider outputs into a unified operating layer that structures workflows, decisions, cases and evidence for clearer, audit-ready compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs seeking connected compliance workflows that preserve audit evidence, enable bank due diligence and maintain enterprise-grade operational governance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY consolidate multiple compliance dashboards efficiently
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Show how compliance workflows connect fragmented provider outputs
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Explain how audit evidence is preserved across systems

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY consolidate compliance dashboards?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects fragmented compliance dashboards into one operational layer, connecting provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions and reporting for clearer, more consistent review processes.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage multi-provider workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates multiple provider outputs by routing checks into a single workflow, applying internal rules, opening cases, logging decisions and linking related evidence for operational efficiency.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence history, decision logs and case records to support audit readiness and allows teams to review how compliance and supervisory decisions were made.
faq_4_question: How does SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: SFTY integrates above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools, connecting their outputs without replacing them, while supporting role-based access and audit logging for governance.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into one compliance operating layer, providing structured workflows, evidence preservation and reporting support across multiple vendors.
final_title: Consolidate compliance dashboards into one workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs into structured cases, audit-ready evidence and controlled compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
